mapper.select: select user_id from user where user_name = #{username} and del_flag = '0'

select count(*) from customer c where c.user_id= #{caregiverId} and c.del_flag = '0'
and c.customer_name like concat('%', #{customerName}, '%')
mapper.update: update customer set user_id=#{caregiverId} where customer_id=#{customerId}
update customer set user_id=null where customer_id= #{customerId}
UPDATE user SET del_flag = '1' WHERE user_name = #{userName} AND del_flag = '0'
mapper.select: select img from user where user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE customer SET user_id = NULL WHERE user_id = #{oldUserId} AND del_flag = '0'
mapper.select: select email from user where user_id = #{userId}

select sum(nir.execution_times * nir.purchasing_times - nir.executed_times) from customer c, nursing_item_record nir where c.customer_id = nir.customer_id and c.user_id = #{userId} and c.del_flag = '0' and nir.del_flag = '0'
